_publications._publicationTitle: Cell of origin and microenvironment contribution for NF1-associated dermal neurofibromas.

_contextSnippet: X-gal staining of the tumors demonstrated that the tumor cells were LacZ-positive...thus indicating that the neurofibromas were derived from the transplanted SKPs
details: ROSA26 reporter successfully marked transplanted SKPs, allowing verification that tumors derived from transplanted cells rather than host cells
